title: Alarm Clock
description:
Creates a pulse on output (Aon) at a preset time.
A snooze function is also integrated.
In addition to individual days of the week, you can define your own alarm times for the operating modes "Public Holiday", "Vacation", and "School Holidays/Day off".
For the operating modes either corresponding operating times must be created or the output of the respective operating mode must be activated via a program logic.

inputs.description: Pulse sets output (Buzzer) to 0 and starts snooze timer for the duration of parameter (Sd). Another pulse during an active snooze timer restarts the timer.
Enables / disables the alarm entry 'Default alarm'. A pulse during an active alarm ends the alarm.

inputs.summary: Set alarm time for default alarm
inputs.description: Defined by minutes past midnight (E.g. 360 min = 06:00am)
Resets parameters and settings of the block to the default values as specified in the block preset.
Pulse: Outputs are reset / switched off. On: Block is locked. Dominating input. The name of the connected sensor is used in the user interface.

outputs.description: ON when alarm sound is active. OFF during snooze time.
Outputs a pulse before the alarm. Start time set via parameter (Pat).
On, when alarm entry 'Default alarm' is enabled.
Outputs date and time of the next alarm
Intelligent API based connector. API Commands

parameters.description: Remanence input: If active, the function block retains its previous state after a Miniserver reboot. The state of the function block is saved: – When saving to the Miniserver – At a planned reboot – Before a backup – Once per hour The data is saved on the SD card.
Ends alarm after set time. If setting "Confirmation required" is activated, the snooze timer starts after the alarm duration has expired.
Time that the pre-alarm is started before the alarm.
Snooze duration until the alarm sound is restarted.
This parameter is only visible in certain configurations.
This parameter is only visible in certain configurations.
1: Deep 4-way beep 2: High 4-way beep 3: Deep 2-way beep 4: High 2-fold beep 5: Siren This parameter is only visible in certain configurations.
This parameter is only visible in certain configurations.
1 = Alarm sound fades in for the duration of 60 seconds. 0 = No fade-in This parameter is only visible in certain configurations.

properties.description: After the alarm the snooze timer starts automatically until it is acknowledged
